question: What was Delta Airlines' revised first-quarter profit forecast per share?
answer: Delta Airlines reduced its first-quarter profit forecast to no more than 50 cents per share.
keypoints: Delta Airlines reduced its first-quarter profit forecast to no more than 50 cents per share, down from an earlier prediction of up to twice that amount.

question: Why did Delta Airlines cut its profit forecast?
answer: Delta Airlines attributed the forecast cut to worries over the US economic outlook impacting travel demand.
keypoints: Delta Airlines attributed the forecast cut to worries over the US economic outlook impacting travel demand.
